title: eriobotrya fragrans var. furfuracea
intro: Eriobotrya fragrans var. furfuracea, also known as the Chinese loquat, is a variety of the loquat plant that is native to China and is prized for its fragrant flowers and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Eriobotrya fragrans var. furfuracea include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and sore throats, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. Eriobotrya fragrans var. furfuracea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
